understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on a tile grid to reach the goal gem (+). Because the goal is always in the direction gravity pulls, the objective is to create and take safe fall paths that ultimately land on the goal without touching hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid support tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal; this can change the y-position significantly if a vertical passage is opened. CLICK targets a specific tile position and interacts with clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., removing an x block) to open or alter fall routes; clicks may also immediately cause a fall if they remove the block supporting the player in the gravity direction. Landing on spikes (u/v) causes an immediate loss. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click. The level is solved by combining limited horizontal moves with strategic clicks to open safe passages and avoid hazards while managing the turn budget.
